chunks.text: Get your free quote today ENQUIRE NOW Why Builders Choose JDC Same-Day Call-Outs All-Size Jobs Safety Focused Dependable Crew REQUEST A FREE QUOTE Ready to clear your site. Whether you’re wrapping up a renovation or clearing a construction site, we’ll have it spotless in no time. Call now or request a same-day pickup online.

ENQUIRE NOW

--- NEW BUILDS ---
New Builds Sydney Building With Precision Build Your Dream Home With JDC At JDC Carpentry & Construction, we bring your vision to life with expertly built new homes across Sydney’s Eastern Suburbs and surrounds. From concept to completion, we deliver high-quality, functional, and stylish new builds tailored to your lifestyle and budget.

Dedicated to Excellence Our Commitment to You We know building a home is one of the biggest investments you’ll ever make, which is why we’re committed to open communication, transparent pricing , and delivering a home you’ll be proud of for years to come. With clear timelines and progress updates, no hidden costs , and a focus on premium materials and workmanship, we make the building process as seamless and stress-free as possible.

Most new builds take between 6–12 months, depending on the size of the project, site conditions, and council approvals. We’ll give you a clear timeline before construction begins. Do you handle council approvals and permits. Yes. We take care of the approval process, liaising with local councils to ensure all permits, regulations, and compliance requirements are met. Can you help with design and plans.

JDC Carpentry & Construction

--- RUBBISH REMOVAL ---
RUBBISH REMOVAL SYDNEY Quick, No-Fuss Waste Pickup Fast, Reliable Waste Removal for Builders & Contractors Whether you’re wrapping up a renovation or clearing debris from a new build, JDC Carpentry & Construction provides fast, reliable rubbish removal for builders and trades across Sydney. We offer same-day pickups , flexible scheduling, and a clean finish, so your site stays safe, organised, and ready for the next stage of work.

We’ll strip, remove, and leave your site spotless, ready for the next trade to step in. Our team safely dismantles and removes: Bathrooms and laundries Kitchens and joinery Small decks, patios, and pergolas Wall linings, flooring, and fixtures Vacancy & Turnover Cleans For builders, landlords, and property managers, we offer efficient vacancy clean-outs to get properties ready for sale, rent, or renovation. We remove old furniture, appliances, and general rubbish quickly and responsibly.

ENQUIRE NOW What We Remove General & Construction Waste From timber offcuts to full demolition loads, we remove all types of construction and household waste, including: Mixed site rubbish & packaging materials Timber, gyprock, tiles, and concrete Old fixtures, cabinetry, and flooring Green waste and non-hazardous debris Get your free quote today ENQUIRE NOW strip, remove, & leave your site spotless Demolition & Strip-Outs JDC also handles small-scale demolition and internal strip-outs to prepare spaces for renovation.

Simple & Same-Day Our process Fast, efficient, and builder-friendly. 01 Send a Quick Enquiry Share your address and a few details or photos of the waste. 02 Confirm the Time We’ll book a same-day or next-day pickup slot that fits your schedule. 03 We Arrive & Load Our crew handles all lifting, sorting, and disposal. 04 Clean & Clear The site is left tidy, compliant, and ready for your next stage of work.

Our Building Solutions New Build expertise At JDC Carpentry & Construction, we offer a complete range of new build services tailored to your goals and lifestyle. Whether you’re building your forever home, an investment property, or a multi-dwelling project, our team has the experience to deliver. Custom Home Builds Knockdown & Rebuilds Duplexes & Multi-Dwellings Ready to Design Your Dream Home. ENQUIRE NOW Working with JDC Construction on this project was an incredible experience.

The attention to detail, commitment to sustainability, and elegant finishes throughout the house make it truly special. Juan and the crew kept everything running smoothly, and the end result is a home that’s both beautiful and practical. We couldn’t be happier. REQUEST A FREE QUOTE Your new home, designed and built your way. Your dream home starts here. At JDC Carpentry & Construction, we make the building process seamless, stress-free, and tailored to you.

We can work with your existing architect or designer, or we can help connect you with trusted professionals. Our team ensures the design is practical, achievable, and within your budget. What areas do you service. We primarily build across Sydney’s Eastern Suburbs and surrounding areas, but we’re open to projects in other parts of Sydney depending on scope. What type of homes do you build. We specialise in custom homes, knockdown rebuilds, duplexes, and multi-dwelling projects.

Our Extension Solutions Tailored Designs for Every Home At JDC Carpentry & Construction, we design and build extensions that give you the extra space you need while blending seamlessly with your existing home. From single-storey additions to second-storey builds, our team delivers practical, stylish, and lasting results that add both comfort and value. Single-Storey Extensions Need extra space without overhauling your whole property.

ENQUIRE NOW Heritage & Character Home Extensions We understand the importance of preserving character while upgrading functionality. ENQUIRE NOW Start Your Extension Project Today ENQUIRE NOW Space, Comfort & Value Why Extend With JDC Carpentry & Construction. Single-storey extensions are a cost-effective way to add living areas, bedrooms, or a home office. With new hardwood floors , skylights , a custom-designed kitchen , elegant wainscoting, and an upgraded bathroom , this project balances timeless design with contemporary functionality. Every detail was thoughtfully considered to breathe new life into this character-filled residence.

--- Privacy Policy ---
Privacy Policy Introduction At JDC Carpentry & Construction, we value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy outlines how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website and use our services.

Your continued use of our website and services after any changes to this Privacy Policy constitutes your acceptance of the revised policy. Contact Us If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or our privacy practices, please contact us at: JDC Carpentry & Construction Eastern Suburbs, Sydney Email: jdcconstructions@outlook. com Phone: 0413 574 615 Thank you for trusting JDC Carpentry & Construction with your information.

Third-Party Links Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or the content of these websites. We encourage you to review the privacy policies of any third-party websites you visit. Changes to This Privacy Policy We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the effective date.

Legal Requirements : We may disclose your information if required to do so by law or in response to valid requests by public authorities. Business Transfers : If we are involved in a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, your information may be transferred as part of that transaction. Security of Your Information We take reasonable measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, use, disclosure, alteration, or destruction.

Effective Date: 28/9/24 Information We Collect Personal Information : We may collect personal information such as your name, email address, phone number, and any other information you voluntarily provide to us through our contact forms, emails, or other communication methods. Usage Data : We may collect information about your interactions with our website, such as your IP address, browser type, operating system, pages visited, and the dates and times of your visits.
This information helps us understand how you use our website and improve our services.

How We Use Your Information We use the information we collect for various purposes, including: To provide, operate, and maintain our website and services To respond to your inquiries and provide customer support To send you updates, promotional materials, and other information related to our services To analyze and improve our website and services To comply with legal obligations and protect our rights Disclosure of Your Information We may share your information in the following circumstances: With Service Providers : We may share your information with third-party service providers who perform services on our behalf, such as website hosting, data analysis, and marketing assistance.
